results.rendered_html:
sayoni (2. sa + yo˚)
1〉 adj.
a〉 gemeinschaftlichen Schooss d. h. g. Ursprung habend  ṚV. 1,159,4 . amartyo martyena 164,30 . 3,1,6 . 10,30,10 . vīro vīreṇa  AV. 3,5,8 . 7,19,1 . 19,52,1 .
— b〉 sammt dem Schooss, — der Heimath, — dem Ort u. s. w., damit verbunden  AV. 6,122,4 . sayonirlokamupa yāhyetam 12,3,19 . 53 .  KĀṬH. 29,7 . agni  TS. 5,1,4,2 . 2,6,5 . 4,2,1 . anna 5,1,9,4 . 4,8,3 . yajña 6,1,3,7 .
— 2〉 m.
a〉 ein N. Indraʼs.
— b〉 proximity to a wife.
— c〉 a pair of nippers for cutting betel-nut  WILSON  nach  ŚABDĀRTHAK.

sayoni a.
1 Having the same womb, uterine.
2 Closely related to.
3 Closely united with the womb.
— niḥ
